_info.description:
Test rejection of blocks where the `excessBlobGas`.

- decreases more than `BLOB_TARGET_GAS_PER_BLOCK` in a single block
    with zero blobs.
- increases more than `BLOB_TARGET_GAS_PER_BLOCK` in a single block
    with max blobs.
